Class GsonProcessingMetrics.Statistics

java.lang.Object
org.apache.axis2.json.gsonh2.GsonProcessingMetrics.Statistics
Enclosing class:
GsonProcessingMetrics
public static class GsonProcessingMetrics.Statistics extends Object
Comprehensive statistics data class (based on HTTP/2 StreamingMetrics).
